faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Syosset homes?
faqs.answer: Syosset properties most commonly deal with German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, and American cockroaches in basements and crawl spaces. We also occasionally treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded cockroaches, tailoring our approach to the specific species present.
